metadata.name: linkedin_ads__account_report
metadata.comment: Each record in this table represents the daily performance of ads at the account level.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

version_tag.name: version_tag
version_tag.comment: An integer representation of the version of the account.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

status.name: status
status.comment:
ACTIVE - Account is active; this is the default state
CANCELLED - Account has been permanently cancelled
DRAFT - Account is in draft status, meaning it's not yet fully set up and it is not serving
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the account has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending
REMOVED - Denotes that the account was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

type.name: type
type.comment:
BUSINESS - This is the only value allowed when creating accounts through the API.
ENTERPRISE - This value cannot be used to create accounts through the API and is reserved for accounts created by LinkedIn's internal ad operations systems.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the account was created.

total_conversions.name: total_conversions
total_conversions.comment: The total conversions being brought in the conversion fields you select in your `linkedin_ads__conversion_fields`.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency, on the given day.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: linkedin_ads__campaign_group_report
metadata.comment: Each record in this table represents the daily performance of ads at the campaign group level.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign group.

campaign_group_name.name: campaign_group_name
campaign_group_name.comment: A label for the campaign group.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

status.name: status
status.comment: Status of campaign group. Possible values are: ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign group is capable of serving ads, subject to run date and budget limitations (as well as any other limitations at the account or campaign level). ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign group is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived. CANCELLED - Denotes that the campaign group has been permanently canceled and cannot be reactivated. Not a settable status. DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign group is in a preliminary state and should temporarily not be served. PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign group meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be. PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign group has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending. REMOVED - Denoted that the campaign group was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

is_backfilled.name: is_backfilled
is_backfilled.comment: Flag that denotes whether the campaign group was created organically or to backfill existing campaigns. This is a read-only field set by the system. Default = false.

run_schedule_start_at.name: run_schedule_start_at
run_schedule_start_at.comment: Represents the inclusive (greater than or equal to) date when to start running the associated campaigns under this campaign group. This field is required.

run_schedule_end_at.name: run_schedule_end_at
run_schedule_end_at.comment: Represents the exclusive (strictly less than) date when to stop running the associated campaigns under this campaign group. If this field is unset, it indicates an open range with no end date.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the campaign group was created.

total_conversions.name: total_conversions
total_conversions.comment: The total conversions being brought in the conversion fields you select in your `linkedin_ads__conversion_fields`.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency, on the given day.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: linkedin_ads__campaign_report
metadata.comment: Each record in this table represents the daily performance of ads at the campaign level.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign.

version_tag.name: version_tag
version_tag.comment: An integer representation of the version of the campaign.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign group.

campaign_group_name.name: campaign_group_name
campaign_group_name.comment: A label for the campaign group.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

campaign_status.name: campaign_status
campaign_status.comment:
ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign is fully servable.
PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be.
ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived.
COMPLETED - Denotes that the campaign has reached a specified budgetary or chronological limit.
CANCELED - Denotes that the campaign has been permanently canceled, such as when an advertising account is permanently closed.
DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign is still being edited and not eligible for serving. Some validation will be postponed until the campaign is activated.
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending.
REMOVED - Denotes that the campaign was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

campaign_group_status.name: campaign_group_status
campaign_group_status.comment: Status of campaign's campaign group. Possible values are: ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign group is capable of serving ads, subject to run date and budget limitations (as well as any other limitations at the account or campaign level). ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign group is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived. CANCELLED - Denotes that the campaign group has been permanently canceled and cannot be reactivated. Not a settable status. DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign group is in a preliminary state and should temporarily not be served. PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign group meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be. PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign group has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending. REMOVED - Denoted that the campaign group was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

type.name: type
type.comment:
TEXT_AD - Text-based ads that show up in the right column or top of the page on LinkedIn.
SPONSORED_UPDATES - Native ads that promote a company's content updates in the LinkedIn feed.
SPONSORED_INMAILS - Personalized messages with a call-to-action button delivered to a LinkedIn's member inbox.
DYNAMIC - Ads that are dynamically personalized.

cost_type.name: cost_type
cost_type.comment:
CPM - Cost per thousand advertising impressions. If type=SPONSORED_INMAILS; cost per send(CPS) is measured as CPM x 1000.
CPC- Cost per individual click on the associated link.
CPV- Cost per view for video ads.

creative_selection.name: creative_selection
creative_selection.comment:
ROUND_ROBIN - Rotate through available creatives to serve them as evenly as possible.
OPTIMIZED (default) - Bias selection taking into account such as expected performance. Not available for Message and Conversation Ads (type=SPONSORED_INMAILS).

daily_budget_amount.name: daily_budget_amount
daily_budget_amount.comment: Maximum amount to spend per day UTC. The amount of money as a real number string.

daily_budget_currency_code.name: daily_budget_currency_code
daily_budget_currency_code.comment: ISO currency code. The currency must match that of the parent account.

unit_cost_amount.name: unit_cost_amount
unit_cost_amount.comment: This value is used as one of the following: amount to bid (for manual bidding), amount which is the target cost (for target cost bidding) per click,  impression, or other event depending on the pricing model, or cost cap (for cost cap bidding). The amount of money as a real number string.  The amount should be non-negative if the bidding strategy is manual, target cost, or cost cap bidding. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.

unit_cost_currency_code.name: unit_cost_currency_code
unit_cost_currency_code.comment: Amount to bid per click, impression, or other event depending on the pricing model. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.  ISO currency code.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

format.name: format
format.comment: The ad format on the campaign level. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/campaign-formats?view=li-lms-2022-07

locale_country.name: locale_country
locale_country.comment: Locale of the campaign. An uppercase two-letter country code as defined by ISO-3166.

locale_language.name: locale_language
locale_language.comment: Locale of the campaign. A lowercase two-letter language code as defined by ISO-639.

objective_type.name: objective_type
objective_type.comment: Campaign Objective type values. Click [here](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads-reporting/ad-budget-pricing-type-combinations?view=li-lms-2022-07) for Campaign Objective descriptions. One of: - BRAND_AWARENESS - ENGAGEMENT - JOB_APPLICANTS - LEAD_GENERATION - WEBSITE_CONVERSIONS - WEBSITE_VISITS - VIDEO_VIEWS

optimization_target_type.name: optimization_target_type
optimization_target_type.comment: Determines how this campaign is optimized for spending. If this is not set, there is no optimization. Refer to the documentation here. Default = 'NONE'.

is_audience_expansion_enabled.name: is_audience_expansion_enabled
is_audience_expansion_enabled.comment: Boolean (default=false) representing whether Audience Expansion is enabled for the campaign provides query expansion for certain targeting criteria.

is_offsite_delivery_enabled.name: is_offsite_delivery_enabled
is_offsite_delivery_enabled.comment: Boolean indicating if this campaign to allowed to be served on the LinkedIn Audience Network to extend the reach of your campaign by delivering ads beyond the  LinkedIn feed to members on third-party apps and sites.	(default will be "True" from June 30, 2022)

run_schedule_start_at.name: run_schedule_start_at
run_schedule_start_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the inclusive (greater than or equal to) value in which to start the range.

run_schedule_end_at.name: run_schedule_end_at
run_schedule_end_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the exclusive (strictly less than) value in which to end the range, if provided.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the campaign was created.

total_conversions.name: total_conversions
total_conversions.comment: The total conversions being brought in the conversion fields you select in your `linkedin_ads__conversion_fields`.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency, on the given day.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: linkedin_ads__creative_report
metadata.comment: Each record in this table represents the daily performance of ads at the creative level.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

creative_id.name: creative_id
creative_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the creative.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the creative's campaign.

campaign_name.name: campaign_name
campaign_name.comment: A label for the creative's campaign.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign group.

campaign_group_name.name: campaign_group_name
campaign_group_name.comment: A label for the campaign group.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

click_uri.name: click_uri
click_uri.comment: The URL where the member should be redirected to, on clicking the text ad or spotlight ad.

click_uri_type.name: click_uri_type
click_uri_type.comment: Will either be `text_ad`, `spotlight`, or `null` to indicate the origin of the click_uri.

creative_status.name: creative_status
creative_status.comment:
ACTIVE - Creative creation is complete and creative is available for review and serve.
PAUSED - Creative creation is complete and creative is current, but should temporarily not be served. This status is not valid upon creation.
DRAFT - Creative creation is incomplete and may still be edited.
ARCHIVED - Creative creation is complete, but creative should not be served and should be separated from non-archived creatives in any UI.
CANCELED - Creative is permanently canceled.

campaign_status.name: campaign_status
campaign_status.comment:
ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign is fully servable.
PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be.
ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived.
COMPLETED - Denotes that the campaign has reached a specified budgetary or chronological limit.
CANCELED - Denotes that the campaign has been permanently canceled, such as when an advertising account is permanently closed.
DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign is still being edited and not eligible for serving. Some validation will be postponed until the campaign is activated.
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending.
REMOVED - Denotes that the campaign was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

campaign_group_status.name: campaign_group_status
campaign_group_status.comment: Status of campaign's campaign group. Possible values are: ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign group is capable of serving ads, subject to run date and budget limitations (as well as any other limitations at the account or campaign level). ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign group is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived. CANCELLED - Denotes that the campaign group has been permanently canceled and cannot be reactivated. Not a settable status. DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign group is in a preliminary state and should temporarily not be served. PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign group meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be. PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign group has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending. REMOVED - Denoted that the campaign group was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the creative was created.

total_conversions.name: total_conversions
total_conversions.comment: The total conversions being brought in the conversion fields you select in your `linkedin_ads__conversion_fields`.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency, on the given day.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: linkedin_ads__monthly_campaign_region_report
metadata.comment: Each record in this table represents the monthly performance of a campaign at the country level.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign.

version_tag.name: version_tag
version_tag.comment: An integer representation of the version of the campaign.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign group.

campaign_group_name.name: campaign_group_name
campaign_group_name.comment: A label for the campaign group.

account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

campaign_status.comment:
ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign is fully servable.
PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be.
ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived.
COMPLETED - Denotes that the campaign has reached a specified budgetary or chronological limit.
CANCELED - Denotes that the campaign has been permanently canceled, such as when an advertising account is permanently closed.
DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign is still being edited and not eligible for serving. Some validation will be postponed until the campaign is activated.
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending.
REMOVED - Denotes that the campaign was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

campaign_group_status.name: campaign_group_status
campaign_group_status.comment: Status of campaign's campaign group. Possible values are: ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign group is capable of serving ads, subject to run date and budget limitations (as well as any other limitations at the account or campaign level). ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign group is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived. CANCELLED - Denotes that the campaign group has been permanently canceled and cannot be reactivated. Not a settable status. DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign group is in a preliminary state and should temporarily not be served. PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign group meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be. PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign group has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending. REMOVED - Denoted that the campaign group was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

campaign_type.name: campaign_type
campaign_type.comment:
TEXT_AD - Text-based ads that show up in the right column or top of the page on LinkedIn.
SPONSORED_UPDATES - Native ads that promote a company's content updates in the LinkedIn feed.
SPONSORED_INMAILS - Personalized messages with a call-to-action button delivered to a LinkedIn's member inbox.
DYNAMIC - Ads that are dynamically personalized.

cost_type.name: cost_type
cost_type.comment:
CPM - Cost per thousand advertising impressions. If type=SPONSORED_INMAILS; cost per send(CPS) is measured as CPM x 1000.
CPC- Cost per individual click on the associated link.
CPV- Cost per view for video ads.

creative_selection.name: creative_selection
creative_selection.comment:
ROUND_ROBIN - Rotate through available creatives to serve them as evenly as possible.
OPTIMIZED (default) - Bias selection taking into account such as expected performance. Not available for Message and Conversation Ads (type=SPONSORED_INMAILS).

daily_budget_amount.name: daily_budget_amount
daily_budget_amount.comment: Maximum amount to spend per day UTC. The amount of money as a real number string.

daily_budget_currency_code.name: daily_budget_currency_code
daily_budget_currency_code.comment: ISO currency code. The currency must match that of the parent account.

unit_cost_amount.name: unit_cost_amount
unit_cost_amount.comment: This value is used as one of the following: amount to bid (for manual bidding), amount which is the target cost (for target cost bidding) per click,  impression, or other event depending on the pricing model, or cost cap (for cost cap bidding). The amount of money as a real number string.  The amount should be non-negative if the bidding strategy is manual, target cost, or cost cap bidding. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.

unit_cost_currency_code.name: unit_cost_currency_code
unit_cost_currency_code.comment: Amount to bid per click, impression, or other event depending on the pricing model. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.  ISO currency code.

account_currency.name: account_currency
account_currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

format.name: format
format.comment: The ad format on the campaign level. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/campaign-formats?view=li-lms-2022-07

campaign_locale_country.name: campaign_locale_country
campaign_locale_country.comment: Locale of the campaign. An uppercase two-letter country code as defined by ISO-3166.

campaign_locale_language.name: campaign_locale_language
campaign_locale_language.comment: Locale of the campaign. A lowercase two-letter language code as defined by ISO-639.

objective_type.name: objective_type
objective_type.comment: Campaign Objective type values. Click [here](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads-reporting/ad-budget-pricing-type-combinations?view=li-lms-2022-07) for Campaign Objective descriptions. One of: - BRAND_AWARENESS - ENGAGEMENT - JOB_APPLICANTS - LEAD_GENERATION - WEBSITE_CONVERSIONS - WEBSITE_VISITS - VIDEO_VIEWS

optimization_target_type.name: optimization_target_type
optimization_target_type.comment: Determines how this campaign is optimized for spending. If this is not set, there is no optimization. Refer to the documentation here. Default = 'NONE'.

is_audience_expansion_enabled.name: is_audience_expansion_enabled
is_audience_expansion_enabled.comment: Boolean (default=false) representing whether Audience Expansion is enabled for the campaign provides query expansion for certain targeting criteria.

is_offsite_delivery_enabled.name: is_offsite_delivery_enabled
is_offsite_delivery_enabled.comment: Boolean indicating if this campaign to allowed to be served on the LinkedIn Audience Network to extend the reach of your campaign by delivering ads beyond the  LinkedIn feed to members on third-party apps and sites.	(default will be "True" from June 30, 2022)

run_schedule_start_at.name: run_schedule_start_at
run_schedule_start_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the inclusive (greater than or equal to) value in which to start the range.

run_schedule_end_at.name: run_schedule_end_at
run_schedule_end_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the exclusive (strictly less than) value in which to end the range, if provided.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the campaign was created.

total_conversions.name: total_conversions
total_conversions.comment: The total conversions being brought in the conversion fields you select in your `linkedin_ads__conversion_fields`.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency, on the given day.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_linkedin_ads__account_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a 'version' of an account.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the account.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: The ISO 4217 currency code of the account, such as 'USD' for United States Dollar (default).

version_tag.name: version_tag
version_tag.comment: An integer representation of the version of the account.

status.name: status
status.comment:
ACTIVE - Account is active; this is the default state
CANCELLED - Account has been permanently cancelled
DRAFT - Account is in draft status, meaning it's not yet fully set up and it is not serving
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the account has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending
REMOVED - Denotes that the account was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

type.name: type
type.comment:
BUSINESS - This is the only value allowed when creating accounts through the API.
ENTERPRISE - This value cannot be used to create accounts through the API and is reserved for accounts created by LinkedIn's internal ad operations systems.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the account was created.

is_latest_version.name: is_latest_version
is_latest_version.comment: Boolean of whether the record is the latest version of the account.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_linkedin_ads__campaign_group_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a 'version' of a campaign group.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign group.

campaign_group_name.name: campaign_group_name
campaign_group_name.comment: A label for the campaign group.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: The ID of the account the campaign group belongs to.

status.name: status
status.comment: Status of campaign group. Possible values are: ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign group is capable of serving ads, subject to run date and budget limitations (as well as any other limitations at the account or campaign level). ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign group is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived. CANCELLED - Denotes that the campaign group has been permanently canceled and cannot be reactivated. Not a settable status. DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign group is in a preliminary state and should temporarily not be served. PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign group meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be. PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign group has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending. REMOVED - Denoted that the campaign group was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

is_backfilled.name: is_backfilled
is_backfilled.comment: Flag that denotes whether the campaign group was created organically or to backfill existing campaigns. This is a read-only field set by the system. Default = false.

run_schedule_start_at.name: run_schedule_start_at
run_schedule_start_at.comment: Represents the inclusive (greater than or equal to) date when to start running the associated campaigns under this campaign group. This field is required.

run_schedule_end_at.name: run_schedule_end_at
run_schedule_end_at.comment: Represents the exclusive (strictly less than) date when to stop running the associated campaigns under this campaign group. If this field is unset, it indicates an open range with no end date.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the campaign group was created.

is_latest_version.name: is_latest_version
is_latest_version.comment: Boolean of whether the record is the latest version of the campaign group.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_linkedin_ads__campaign_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a 'version' of a campaign.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the campaign.

version_tag.name: version_tag
version_tag.comment: An integer representation of the version of the campaign.

campaign_group_id.name: campaign_group_id
campaign_group_id.comment: The ID of the campaign group the campaign belongs to.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: The ID of the account the campaign belongs to.

status.name: status
status.comment:
ACTIVE - Denotes that the campaign is fully servable.
PAUSED - Denotes that the campaign meets all requirements to be served, but temporarily should not be.
ARCHIVED - Denotes that the campaign is presently inactive, and should mostly be hidden in the UI until un-archived.
COMPLETED - Denotes that the campaign has reached a specified budgetary or chronological limit.
CANCELED - Denotes that the campaign has been permanently canceled, such as when an advertising account is permanently closed.
DRAFT - Denotes that the campaign is still being edited and not eligible for serving. Some validation will be postponed until the campaign is activated.
PENDING_DELETION - Denotes that the campaign has been requested to be deleted that is currently pending.
REMOVED - Denotes that the campaign was deleted, but must remain fetchable due to the existence of performance data.

type.name: type
type.comment:
TEXT_AD - Text-based ads that show up in the right column or top of the page on LinkedIn.
SPONSORED_UPDATES - Native ads that promote a company's content updates in the LinkedIn feed.
SPONSORED_INMAILS - Personalized messages with a call-to-action button delivered to a LinkedIn's member inbox.
DYNAMIC - Ads that are dynamically personalized.

cost_type.name: cost_type
cost_type.comment:
CPM - Cost per thousand advertising impressions. If type=SPONSORED_INMAILS; cost per send(CPS) is measured as CPM x 1000.
CPC- Cost per individual click on the associated link.
CPV- Cost per view for video ads.

creative_selection.name: creative_selection
creative_selection.comment:
ROUND_ROBIN - Rotate through available creatives to serve them as evenly as possible.
OPTIMIZED (default) - Bias selection taking into account such as expected performance. Not available for Message and Conversation Ads (type=SPONSORED_INMAILS).

daily_budget_amount.name: daily_budget_amount
daily_budget_amount.comment: Maximum amount to spend per day UTC. The amount of money as a real number string.

daily_budget_currency_code.name: daily_budget_currency_code
daily_budget_currency_code.comment: ISO currency code. The currency must match that of the parent account.

unit_cost_amount.name: unit_cost_amount
unit_cost_amount.comment: This value is used as one of the following: amount to bid (for manual bidding), amount which is the target cost (for target cost bidding) per click,  impression, or other event depending on the pricing model, or cost cap (for cost cap bidding). The amount of money as a real number string.  The amount should be non-negative if the bidding strategy is manual, target cost, or cost cap bidding. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.

unit_cost_currency_code.name: unit_cost_currency_code
unit_cost_currency_code.comment: Amount to bid per click, impression, or other event depending on the pricing model. The default is 0 with the currency code set to match that of the associated account.  ISO currency code.

format.name: format
format.comment: The ad format on the campaign level. See https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/campaign-formats?view=li-lms-2022-07

locale_country.name: locale_country
locale_country.comment: Locale of the campaign. An uppercase two-letter country code as defined by ISO-3166.

locale_language.name: locale_language
locale_language.comment: Locale of the campaign. A lowercase two-letter language code as defined by ISO-639.

objective_type.name: objective_type
objective_type.comment: Campaign Objective type values. Click [here](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads-reporting/ad-budget-pricing-type-combinations?view=li-lms-2022-07) for Campaign Objective descriptions. One of: - BRAND_AWARENESS - ENGAGEMENT - JOB_APPLICANTS - LEAD_GENERATION - WEBSITE_CONVERSIONS - WEBSITE_VISITS - VIDEO_VIEWS

optimization_target_type.name: optimization_target_type
optimization_target_type.comment: Determines how this campaign is optimized for spending. If this is not set, there is no optimization. Refer to the documentation here. Default = 'NONE'.

is_audience_expansion_enabled.name: is_audience_expansion_enabled
is_audience_expansion_enabled.comment: Boolean (default=false) representing whether Audience Expansion is enabled for the campaign provides query expansion for certain targeting criteria.

is_offsite_delivery_enabled.name: is_offsite_delivery_enabled
is_offsite_delivery_enabled.comment: Boolean indicating if this campaign to allowed to be served on the LinkedIn Audience Network to extend the reach of your campaign by delivering ads beyond the  LinkedIn feed to members on third-party apps and sites.	(default will be "True" from June 30, 2022)

run_schedule_start_at.name: run_schedule_start_at
run_schedule_start_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the inclusive (greater than or equal to) value in which to start the range.

run_schedule_end_at.name: run_schedule_end_at
run_schedule_end_at.comment: Scheduled date range to run associated creatives. The start date must be non-null. Represents the exclusive (strictly less than) value in which to end the range, if provided.

last_modified_at.name: last_modified_at
last_modified_at.comment: The timestamp of when the version was updated.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the campaign was created.

is_latest_version.comment: Boolean of whether the record is the latest version of the campaign.

metadata.name: stg_linkedin_ads__creative_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a 'version' of a creative.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

creative_id.name: creative_id
creative_id.comment: Unique internal ID representing the creative.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: The ID of the campaign the creative belongs to.

status.name: status
status.comment:
ACTIVE - Creative creation is complete and creative is available for review and serve.
PAUSED - Creative creation is complete and creative is current, but should temporarily not be served. This status is not valid upon creation.
DRAFT - Creative creation is incomplete and may still be edited.
ARCHIVED - Creative creation is complete, but creative should not be served and should be separated from non-archived creatives in any UI.
CANCELED - Creative is permanently canceled.

click_uri.name: click_uri
click_uri.comment: The URL where the member should be redirected to, on clicking the text ad or spotlight ad.

created_at.comment: The timestamp of when the creative was created.

click_uri_type.comment: Will either be `text_ad`, `spotlight`, or `null` to indicate the origin of the click_uri.

is_latest_version.name: is_latest_version
is_latest_version.comment: Boolean of whether the record is the latest version of the creative.

base_url.name: base_url
base_url.comment: The base URL of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

url_host.name: url_host
url_host.comment: The URL host of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

url_path.name: url_path
url_path.comment: The URL path of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

utm_source.name: utm_source
utm_source.comment: The utm_source parameter of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

utm_medium.name: utm_medium
utm_medium.comment: The utm_medium parameter of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

utm_campaign.name: utm_campaign
utm_campaign.comment: The utm_campaign parameter of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

utm_content.name: utm_content
utm_content.comment: The utm_content parameter of the ad, extracted from the `click_uri`.

utm_term.name: utm_term

metadata.name: stg_linkedin_ads__monthly_ad_analytics_by_region
metadata.comment: Monthly LinkedIn Ads performance metrics aggregated by member region and campaign.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record if the unioning functionality is being used. If not this field will be empty.

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.comment: Identifier of the LinkedIn Ads campaign.

member_region_geo_id.name: member_region_geo_id
member_region_geo_id.comment: ID representing the region of the LinkedIn members who interacted with the campaign.

impressions.name: impressions
impressions.comment: This is the count of "impressions" for Direct Ads and Sponsored Updates and "sends" for InMails.

cost.name: cost
cost.comment: The cost of the ads in the local currency or USD.

conversion_value_in_local_currency.name: conversion_value_in_local_currency
conversion_value_in_local_currency.comment: The value generated by your conversions, displayed in your LinkedIn account's local currency.

external_website_conversions.name: external_website_conversions
external_website_conversions.comment: The actions taken on your website that you've defined as valuable to your business after clicking on LinkedIn ads.

one_click_leads.name: one_click_leads
one_click_leads.comment: Leads submitted after clicking on LinkedIn ads.
